.. _prodstat:

prodstat
========

**inherit_from**: ['identifier']

Summary
-------

+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|keyword            |default            |attribute          |value              |
+===================+===================+===================+===================+
|**archive_type**   |None               |                   |                   |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |*optional*         |True               |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |*unique*           |True               |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|**collection**     |None               |                   |                   |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |*alias*            |dataset            |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |*lowercase*        |False              |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |*optional*         |True               |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |*unique*           |True               |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|**database**       |None               |                   |                   |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |*alias*            |output_file        |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |*unique*           |True               |

+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|**expver**         |None               |                   |                   |

|                   |                   |*alias*            |experiment_id      |

|                   |                   |                   |expid              |

|                   |                   |*lowercase*        |False              |

+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |*unique*           |True               |

|                   |                   |*validate*         |ValidateChoice     |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |                   |fc                 |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |                   |an                 |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |                   |cl                 |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |                   |ob                 |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
|                   |                   |                   |im                 |
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+
+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+-------------------+

Keywords
--------

archive_type
^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

collection
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |dataset                                          |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

database
^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

this is the name of the database to store the data into. This is not an arbitrary name, it should be given to you by the administrator of gmaopy who will have setup that database and given you the necessary credentials

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |output_file                                      |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

expver
^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |experiment_id                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |expid                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

field
^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |fields                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|type                                             |prodstatdata                                     |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

file_tmpl
^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

location
^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

observer
^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |observers                                        |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

overwrite
^^^^^^^^^

default: **False**

if the statistics being computed are already present in the database, when setting this keyword to False, the application will fail and preserve what is in the database. When True, any data already present will be overwritten. Be careful when using that option.

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

root_tmpl
^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

source
^^^^^^

default: **oper**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

staging_rate
^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **daily**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

storage
^^^^^^^

default: **dbstorer**

the name of a storage class to store the statistics, by default the statistics are saved in an SQL database, to store the statistics in a file, specify: storage = 'filestorer' with output_file = 'filename'

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |store                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

tree_tmpl
^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

type
^^^^

default: **an**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|validate                                         |ValidateChoice                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |fc                                               |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |an                                               |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |cl                                               |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |ob                                               |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |im                                               |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
